code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./RawMaterialStockLevel.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const RawMaterialStockLevel=()=>{const[rawMaterials,setRawMaterials]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchRawMaterials=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/raw-material-stock-level');if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch raw material stock levels');}const data=await response.json();setRawMaterials(data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching raw material stock levels:',error);}};fetchRawMaterials();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"raw-material-stock-level-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Raw Material Stock Level"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"raw-material-stock-level-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Raw Material"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Quantity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Reorder Point"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:rawMaterials.map(material=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:material.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:material.quantity}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:material.reorderPoint})]},material.id))})]})]});};export default RawMaterialStockLevel;
